HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony J. Dipiero, of Hunt & Henriques, Tel. 408.362.2295, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. Gloria Flores' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied based on plaintiff's pleadings, and Ms. Flores' failure to appear at the hearing. The Court will prepare the written order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
